TRUSTED BY 30,000+ ORGANIZATIONS WORLDWIDE
Do 10x more. Burn out less.
Stop wasting your best people on tasks that Wrike AI can do in seconds. Here’s how.
AI agents
Wrike agents are delivering outstanding results in production and in real customer workflows with real operational outcomes.
Explore AI agents
Wrike Copilot
Wrike Copilot is an AI assistant built into your projects that answers questions, summarizes work, and keeps your team moving without the back-and-forth.
Discover Copilot
Productivity features
Dramatically increase output with built-in features that reduce clicks and creation time.
Learn more
AI insights

Your work needs more than a task manager
Wrike gives humans and agents the shared intelligence, structure, and accountability to see your work through to completion.
Ideate & align
Plan & resource
Execute the work

Learn & adapt
Ideate & align
A powerful ideation hub for any size team
Wrike enables you to envision work, easily capture the information you need to kick-start projects, and bring multiple teams into the same place for game-changing visual collaboration.
Request Forms
Visual Collaboration
Wrike’s AI﻿
Plan & resource
Optimal visibility across projects and departments
All the project details and updates you need, all in one place with 360° visibility. Connect cross-functional teams and easily allocate resources as needed.

Integrations

Intuitive features that accelerate delivery
Assign work in minutes, communicate in real time, and spot potential problems before they delay results. Wrike keeps your teams on track and on time, saving you from hours of emails and meetings in the process.
Task Management

&

Mobile Apps
Report & analyze
AI-driven analytics to empower data-driven decisions
Wrike’s advanced analytics use your data to help you make decisions throughout projects and tasks, and after they’re completed. View real-time reports in visual dashboards, and use our AI tools to predict risk and allocate resources.
Dashboards
Advanced Analytics
Time Tracking
Learn & adapt
Improved workflows, impressive results
Capture and integrate information that will help you improve future processes and optimize workflows for better results — and a more engaged team. Integrate mission-critical data into your workflows and accelerate delivery with Wrike.
Automation
Datahub
Custom Item Types
Try Wrike for free
See all features
Every team has work that agents can handle
Wrike provides the intelligence layer agents need to take on repeatable work, so your best people can focus on what only they can do.
Operations
Wrike enables marketing, business, and product operations teams to accelerate approvals and collaborate seamlessly with other teams. Standardize processes using templates, automation, and more.
Learn more
Product Management
Wrike provides end-to-end support to product management teams who need to centralize work and communications. Design a unique workspace with custom fields and workflows.
Learn more
Marketing and Creative
Wrike supports marketing and creative teams as they create projects, campaigns, and assets of every kind — all from one place. Streamline requests and visualize results, plans, and workloads.
Learn more
Professional Services
Wrike helps professional services teams, consultants, and agencies organize multiple projects and clients in one single source of truth. Track billable hours, monitor budgets, and manage resource allocation with ease.
Learn more
Project Management Office
Wrike equips project managers of all types with everything they need to align strategy and OKRs with the execution of projects and programs. Visualize progress and standardize processes with Wrike.
Learn more
IT and Engineering
Wrike helps IT ops and software engineers streamline, manage, and automate service requests to deliver better work faster than ever. Maintain continuous momentum with Wrike.
Learn more
See all teams
Visual collaboration
Wrike Whiteboard
: Map complexity, then conquer it
Visual collaboration lives inside your workspace with Wrike Whiteboard. Keep creative planning and governed execution in one place, so nothing gets lost between ideation and delivery.
Learn more
The
trusted platform
built for complex work
We have two decades of enterprise work intelligence, security, and collaboration data, now extended to give agents the foundation to handle your most consequential work reliably.
Agents informed by 500B+ real work data points
Our Work Intelligence Graph is built from 500B+ historical data points across real enterprises. That means agents act on the deepest organizational context available.
Try Wrike’s AI
Connect the tools you love with 400+ integrations
Wrike Integrate easily syncs Wrike with almost any app your business uses and automates processes both outside and inside our platform.
Learn more
Templates built for repeatable work
Prebuilt templates give agents a proven workflow structure from day one. Customize them for your processes and let agents carry the execution load without reinventing the approach each time.
Get started now
Fully customizable and scalable for any size team
Whether you need to broaden the scope of work or simply scale up, that’s where Wrike thrives. Our platform can be customized for any team, any industry, any size.
Build your way
Support that understands operational complexity
Professional services and premium support from a team that has helped enterprises manage real complexity at scale. Your deployment benefits from 20 years of hard-won enterprise experience.
Explore our services
End-to-end enterprise work management
Turn your teams’ time-consuming manual processes into automated, interconnected workflows. Link cross-functional team processes to drive unparalleled productivity, alignment, and visibility.
Start collaborating
Security built for your most sensitive work
ISO 27001, SOC 2, SOC 3, GDPR. Wrike Lock and role-based access extend to every agent. Sensitive work stays inside the same security framework as your human workforce.
Protect your data
Try Wrike for free
Your work, delivered. 30,000+ times over.

Try our intelligent work management software for free
Sign up for a free two-week trial of Wrike today — no credit card required.
Enter your business email
Try Wrike for free
FAQ
1. What are the different types of licenses?
Wrike has a variety of different options available to suit your team, including two types of user licenses: full users and limited users.
Full users have more default permissions enabled and can do more in Wrike. Regular users and external users are full users and require a paid-user seat (note that external users are limited to certain access rights).
Limited users have fewer permissions and limited access to certain Wrike features. Limited users require a paid user seat at a reduced rate to that of a full user license (as contributors) or may be provisioned into the workspace for free (as viewers).
Read more
2. What happens when my trial has expired?
Your account will be blocked until you choose what you’d like to do with it. From here, you can either downgrade it to the free version or reach out to your Wrike representative. They will be able to discuss the next steps for choosing a plan and whether a trial extension is possible. While your account is blocked, your data will remain intact.
Read more
3. How do I purchase a subscription?
If you are a first-time user, enter your business email at the top of the page to get your 14-day free trial. You can give us a call to get set up straight away or wait for one of our representatives to get in touch to find the right solution for your team.
If you’ve completed a trial, you can purchase the Team plan and the Business plan for up to 15 users with no add-ons in the Account section of your workspace. If you need a larger number of users or a wider set of capabilities, you’ll need to contact your Wrike representative.
Wrike is sold in groups of users. For accounts of up to 30 seats, subscriptions are sold in groups of five. For accounts of 30 to 100 seats, subscriptions are sold in groups of 10. For accounts above 100 seats, subscriptions are sold in groups of 25. Wrike Business plans and above are only available as annual subscriptions.
Read more
4. Can I pay in my local currency and what kind of taxes apply?
All our prices are listed in US dollars, but your bank will be able to convert this to your local currency upon purchase. You will also receive your invoice in US dollars. In regards to tax implications, all of our prices do not include applicable state/local taxes and you (the client) will be responsible for them. If you have any questions, please speak to your sales representative and we’ll be happy to help.
5. Where will my data be hosted?
The location of your data is automatically determined by the geographic region where you register. Accounts created from Europe are hosted in our European data center in Paris, France, while all other accounts are hosted in our primary U.S. data center in Santa Clara, California. If you need to change your data center location, please contact your Wrike representative or our support team.
Learn more
6. Does Wrike have an on-premise solution or is it just cloud-based?
Wrike is entirely cloud-based, meaning there is no need for site visits and our software can be used instantly by remote workers.
7. What does Wrike do to ensure GDPR compliance?
Wrike takes data privacy/security very seriously. We have the following independent third-party certifications:
SOC2 Type II, which shows our commitment to taking a robust and secure approach to products, processes, and security surrounding our customer data
ISO 27001:2013, which confirms that Wrike has an end-to-end security framework and a risk-based approach to managing information security
ISO 27018:2019, which shows Wrike has controls in place to protect Personally Identifiable Information (PII) in accordance with the privacy principles in ISO/IEC 29100 for the public cloud computing environment
CSA STAR, which demonstrates that Wrike has addressed issues critical to cloud security as outlined in the CSA Cloud Controls Matrix, and has been assessed against the STAR Capability Maturity Model for activities in cloud security control areas
In addition to the above certifications, we are
EU & US and Swiss & US Privacy Shield-certified
, GDPR-compliant and CCPA-compliant. We also have an
EU data center
that can be selected to use for our services.
8. What is a Professional Services deployment add-on?
Professional Services refers to the consultancy service that we offer (see the question below). Wrike offers a selection of Professional Services packages designed to successfully onboard your team. Our consultancy team will make sure you get the most from the Wrike solution that you have selected. To learn more about Wrike’s consultancy options, please see our
Professional Services page
.
9. From what team size do you recommend adding a Professional Services deployment to my solution?
Wrike is an intuitive collaboration solution. However, aligning your entire team on a consistent way of working, configuring Wrike, and ensuring long-term adoption can be tricky. Our Professional Services team specializes in understanding and onboarding teams of all sizes, no matter their challenges. We recommend all new teams work with a consultant during onboarding, and insist that teams of 20+ utilize a guided deployment.
10.
Do I need to pay extra to have access to Wrike Copilot and AI agents?
No. All plans starting from the Business tier include a number of AI Elite actions. Entry tiers provide a starter package for experimentation, while the highest tier offers generous action volume to run end-to-end workflows.
In addition to your plan, Wrike also offers an add-on to increase the number of AI Elite actions for your account.
Contact us
to know more about Wrike AI solutions.
11.
If I exceed my plan’s AI action limit, will I be invoiced automatically?
No. Wrike is known for its transparent and fair pricing. This means that when a customer goes beyond their plan limit, a discussion is opened around usage and the best package to power them.

Wrike enhances its website search experience using Google's
Vertex AI Search and Conversation
generative AI service. Users are cautioned that generative AI might produce inappropriate, inaccurate, offensive, or unintended results, and are advised against submitting explicit, harmful, offensive, or illegal content as search input. Neither Wrike nor Google uses your search inputs to train its machine learning models or for advertising purposes, but search activities may be collected and/or stored via cookies in accordance with our
Privacy Policy
if you previously registered on our website. These cookies can be deleted through your browser settings. Wrike's search service is not designed to be used in connection with your personal data or any sensitive data of any kind, which users must refrain from inputting.

analysis.name: Wrike
analysis.tagline: Complex work, delivered by humans and agents
analysis.value_proposition: AI-powered enterprise work management platform that scales what teams and AI agents can deliver with full control and accountability.
analysis.ideal_customer: Enterprise operations, marketing, PMO, product, creative, IT, and professional services teams needing cross-functional project management at scale.

features.name: ai agents
features.description: Autonomous AI agents that execute workflows and deliver operational outcomes

features.name: wrike copilot
features.description: AI assistant that answers questions, summarizes work, and provides project context
features.evidence_quote: Wrike Copilot is an AI assistant built into your projects that answers questions

features.name: ai insights
features.description: Turns raw work data into actionable intelligence and risk prediction
features.evidence_quote: Wrike AI insights turn raw work data into clear, actionable intelligence.

features.name: mcp server
features.description: Model Context Protocol server to connect Wrike to external AI assistants
features.evidence_quote: Connect Wrike to your AI assistants ... with a single seamless experience.

features.name: dashboards
features.description: Real-time visual dashboards for reporting and decision-making

features.name: whiteboards
features.description: Visual brainstorming and ideation canvas
features.evidence_quote: Wrike Whiteboard ... Run brainstorming sessions, visualize complex ideas

features.name: automation
features.description: Custom rules to eliminate manual work
features.evidence_quote: Automation ... Eliminate manual work with custom rules.

features.name: gantt charts
features.description: Interactive timelines for planning and tracking projects

features.name: resource management
features.description: Balance team workloads and capacity across projects

features.name: dynamic request forms
features.description: Customizable intake forms with conditional logic
features.evidence_quote: Dynamic request forms ... Customize forms with conditional logic.

features.name: task management
features.description: Core project and task management

features.name: board view
features.description: Kanban-style board view of work

features.name: table view
features.description: Spreadsheet-style table view of work

features.name: custom fields
features.description: User-defined fields for tasks and projects

features.name: custom workflows
features.description: Configurable statuses and workflow stages

features.name: custom item types
features.description: Bespoke work item types tailored to team processes

features.name: templates
features.description: Prebuilt project setup templates to standardize work

features.name: proofing & approvals
features.description: Asset review, proofing, and approval workflows

features.name: time tracking
features.description: Track time on tasks and projects

features.name: advanced analytics
features.description: AI-driven analytics across projects

features.name: advanced reporting and bi
features.description: Advanced reporting and business intelligence capabilities

features.name: budgeting
features.description: Track project financials and budgets

features.name: sso
features.description: Single sign-on for enterprise identity providers

features.name: advanced security and compliance
features.description: Enterprise security and compliance controls

features.name: wrike lock
features.description: Customer-managed encryption keys for Wrike data
features.evidence_quote: Wrike Lock ... managing your own encryption keys.

features.name: datahub
features.description: Data connection and reporting alignment across workflows
features.evidence_quote: Wrike Datahub ... Simplify your data connection and reporting

features.name: wrike integrate
features.description: No-code automation and end-to-end workflow integration across apps
features.evidence_quote: Wrike Integrate ... build no-code automations, and run end-to-end workflows

features.name: two-way sync
features.description: Bi-directional sync with third-party tools like Jira and GitHub
features.evidence_quote: Set up two-way syncs between your Wrike account and 22 integrated systems, including Jira, GitHub

features.name: mobile apps
features.description: Native mobile apps for iOS and Android
features.evidence_quote: Mobile Apps ... Work seamlessly across all devices.

features.name: desktop apps
features.description: Native desktop apps

features.name: web app
features.description: Browser-based application

features.name: visual collaboration
features.description: Cross-team visual collaboration surfaces for ideation

features.name: comments and reactions
features.description: In-context comments and emoji reactions on tasks
features.evidence_quote: send comments, react with emojis and work together on projects

features.name: one-time passwords
features.description: OTP-based account access controls
features.evidence_quote: manage account security with one-time passwords, account backups

features.name: account backups
features.description: Account-level backups

features.name: user management
features.description: Admin controls for users and permissions
features.evidence_quote: tailor your account to your team's needs with schedules, user management

features.name: schedules
features.description: Working schedules and calendar configuration
features.evidence_quote: tailor your account to your team's needs with schedules

features.name: rest api
features.description: Open, documented RESTful API
features.evidence_quote: Open RESTful API ... Well documented and easy to use

features.name: developer portal

features.evidence_quote: Developer Portal ... Get started with Wrike's API

features.name: work intelligence
features.description: Data-driven cross-workspace insights engine
features.evidence_quote: Wrike Work Intelligence® ... Uncover data-driven insights.

features.name: project portfolio management
features.description: Portfolio-level project management workflow

features.name: campaign management
features.description: Marketing campaign management workflow

features.name: creative production
features.description: Creative production workflow for design/marketing teams

features.name: product lifecycle
features.description: Product lifecycle management workflow

features.name: client service delivery
features.description: Workflow for professional services client delivery

features.name: conversational agent builder
features.description: Tool to build custom conversational AI agents
features.evidence_quote: How we created Wrike's conversational agent builder

differentiators: AI agents delivering operational outcomes in production customer workflows
Unified platform for humans and AI agents with 'full control and clear accountability'
Wrike Datahub for reporting across 30M records at Apex tier
MCP Server for connecting Wrike to external AI assistants
Bi-directional Wrike Sync with 22 integrated systems including Jira/GitHub

recent_ships.what: Apex tier launched — highest plan for human + AI-led enterprise workflows
recent_ships.source: Pricing page marked 'New!' — 'Apex ... Powering human and AI-led enterprise workflows'

recent_ships.what: AI Elite action packs — scalable AI capacity add-on
recent_ships.source: Pricing page marked 'New!' — 'AI Elite action pack ... a fully scalable solution'
Pricing page marked 'New!' — 'Wrike Whiteboard ... Run brainstorming sessions'
Pricing footnote: 'valid only for new purchases occurring on or after January 21, 2026'
Blog: 'How we created Wrike's conversational agent builder'
Landing: 'Wrike Copilot is an AI assistant built into your projects'

recent_ships.what: MCP Server for external AI assistants
recent_ships.source: Landing: 'Connect Wrike to your AI assistants ... with a single seamless experience'

complaints: Privacy concerns raised in HN thread: 'Trello alternative Wrike sells your privacy'

free_tier.limits: Active task limitations apply; web/desktop/mobile only

tiers.name: Free
tiers.headline_inclusions: Essential task mgmt; board & table views; web/desktop/mobile; active task limits

tiers.name: Team
tiers.headline_inclusions: 2-15 users; AI Essentials; shareable dashboard; Gantt; custom fields/workflows

tiers.name: Business
tiers.headline_inclusions: 5-200 users; AI Elite; templates; standard integrations; resource planning

tiers.name: Pinnacle
tiers.headline_inclusions: Advanced resource planning; budgeting; advanced reporting/BI; SSO; Datahub (10K records)

tiers.name: Apex
tiers.headline_inclusions: Unlimited Whiteboards; Wrike Integrate; Wrike Sync bi-directional; Datahub (30M records)

pricing.notes: All prices billed annually per user. New pricing effective Jan 21, 2026. Team tier caps at 15 users; Business at 200. Add-ons (Whiteboard $15/user/mo, Integrate, Two-Way Sync, Datahub, Lock, AI Elite packs) available at custom pricing; most bundled with Apex except Lock and AI Elite packs.
